name: Spicy Chickpea Pasta
recipeIngredient: 2 cans of chickpeas, drained and rinsed
1 - 2 jalapenos (if chili peppers are not very hot you will also need)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the pasta as usual.
2. Meanwhile, heat a Dutch oven over medium heat.
3. Add a little vegetable stock to the pot.
4. Chop the chili peppers into large chunks and sauté them in the stock (include the seeds) for about 2 minutes.
5. Add the chickpeas and more vegetable stock, and cook for 5-10 minutes.
6. Add the butterbeans with liquid and the rest of the vegetable stock to the pot. Let it simmer until the liquid reduces slightly.
7. If the chili peppers are not hot enough, puree 1 or 2 jalapenos in a blender or chopper and add them back into the dish. Then add Tobasco sauce to taste.
Note: Enjoy the leftovers for future meals.
